description: Introduction to coatings, especially focusing on the polymer science and chemistry in these coatings. Chemistry behind these coatings, physical science such as film formation, and the role of various additives used in common formulations.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or declared in Capstone Certificate in Polymer Processing & Manufacturing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Graduate/professional standing or declared in Capstone Certificate in Polymer Processing & Manufacturing
